description_long: This is a medium-sized, contemporary-style couch upholstered in a smooth, tan leather or leather-like material. The seat and backrest are continuous and slightly curved, providing a modern silhouette. Draped over one arm is a textured, red-and-white knit throw blanket, and the seating area is adorned with four decorative accent pillows in various patterns and colors, including blue, white, and gold. The couch stands on four short, exposed black legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The overall design is inviting and comfortable, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern tan leather couch with a knit throw and four patterned accent pillows, supported by short black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat, all four accent pillows, and the draped knit throw on the left armrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the armrest, the draped throw, and the layered arrangement of pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted tan backrest and the tops of the pillows and throw.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right armrest, the edge of the throw, and the stacked pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four loose accent pillows of varying sizes and patterns are arranged along the backrest, with no visible attached or integrated seat or back cushions. The pillows are layered and slightly overlapping.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid tan color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, exposed, and black, likely made of metal, with a simple cylindrical or blocky profile.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are straight, medium-height, and fully upholstered in the same tan material as the rest of the couch, with a slightly rounded outer edge.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is low to medium height, continuous, and smoothly upholstered, with no visible tufting or division; accent pillows provide additional back support.
